_publications._publicationTitle: Development of an adeno-associated virus vector for gene replacement therapy of NF1-related tumors.

_contextSnippet: Two doses of AAV-K55-GRDC24 administered 7 days apart substantially enhanced the therapeutic effect over an extended period in ST88-14 xenografts
details: Two doses of AAV-K55-GRDC24 administered 7 days apart substantially enhanced therapeutic effect over extended period
